sections.title: 1. 🔴 N+1 Query: POST Attendance (`admin/attendance` & `teacher/attendance`)
2. 🔴 useEffect Race Condition: Semua Form Absensi
3. 🔴 N+1 Query: Stats API — Per-Class Attendance
4. 🟡 Redundant Sort on Every Render
sections.content:
**Masalah:** `TeacherAttendanceForm.tsx` dan `AttendanceForm.tsx` melakukan `[...students].sort(...)` dua kali per render — sekali untuk tabel desktop, sekali untuk kartu mobile. Sort ini O(n log n) dan jalan tiap render.

**Fix — `useMemo`:**

```tsx
const sortedStudents = useMemo(() =>
  [...students].sort((a, b) => sortMode === 'abjad'
    ? a.nama.localeCompare(b.nama, 'id')
    : (parseInt(a.nis)||0) - (parseInt(b.nis)||0)
  ),
  [students, sortMode]
);
```

Lalu pakai `sortedStudents` di JSX (baik tablet maupun mobile). Selesai, 2 tempat jadi 1.

---

sections.title: 5. 🟡 Missing Cache: Stats API
6. 🟡 Date Parsing Duplication (Teacher POST)
sections.content:
**Masalah:** Di `teacher/attendance/route.ts` POST, `new Date(tanggal)` dipanggil berulang di dalam loop.

**Fix:** Panggil sekali di atas loop:
```ts
const targetDate = new Date(tanggal); // ← sudah ada di admin POST, tapi teacher POST lompat
```
Ganti semua `new Date(tanggal)` di loop → `targetDate`.

---

sections.title: 7. 🟢 Image Data URL di State
sections.content:
**Masalah:** `FileReader.readAsDataURL` menghasilkan base64 ~3 MB per foto yang disimpan di state (`buktiPreview`). Tidak ada mekanisme cleanup.

**Prioritas rendah** — beri komentar `ponytail:`:
```
// ponytail: base64 preview in state, release with URL.revokeObjectURL if memory pressure appears
```

---

sections.title: Summary
sections.content:
| # | Issue | Lokasi | Severity |
|---|-------|--------|----------|
| 1 | N+1 query di POST attendance | `admin/attendance`, `teacher/attendance` | 🔴 High |
| 2 | Fetch race condition | `TeacherAttendanceForm`, `AttendanceForm` | 🔴 High |
| 3 | N+1 per kelas di stats | `admin/stats/route.ts` | 🔴 High |
| 4 | Sort double-execution | `TeacherAttendanceForm`, `AttendanceForm` | 🟡 Med |
| 5 | Stats uncached | `admin/stats/route.ts` | 🟡 Med |
| 6 | Repeated `new Date()` | `teacher/attendance/route.ts` | 🟢 Low |
| 7 | Base64 preview in state | `TeacherAttendanceForm`, `AttendanceForm` | 🟢 Low |

Mau saya terapkan fix nomor 1, 2, dan 4 langsung? Itu tiga yang dampaknya paling besar — N+1 query, race condition, dan sort duplication.

codeBlocks.code:
for (const item of data) {           // loop over N students
  const student = await prisma.siswa.findUnique(...)       // ← N query
  const existingKhd = await prisma.kehadiran.findUnique(...) // ← N query
  ...
}
const targetDate = new Date(tanggal); // ← sudah ada di admin POST, tapi teacher POST lompat
// ponytail: base64 preview in state, release with URL.revokeObjectURL if memory pressure appears
